homelab_tasks.title: Create accounts for Solomiia
homelab_tasks.description: Set up wife's accounts across homelab services (Jellyfin, Jellyseerr, etc.)

homelab_tasks.title: Copy quality profiles from Radarr to Sonarr
homelab_tasks.description: Mirror Radarr quality/release profiles into Sonarr so movies and shows use consistent settings

homelab_tasks.title: Commit all service configs to repo
homelab_tasks.description: Audit and version-control settings: Radarr/Sonarr profiles, Pi-hole domain lists, Jellyfin config, etc. Ensure ~/homelab repo has everything needed to recreate the stack from scratch

homelab_tasks.title: Add Watcharr
homelab_tasks.description: Deploy Watcharr for personal movie/show ratings and watchlist. Connect to Radarr/Sonarr for downloads. Evaluate if it can replace Jellyseerr for solo use

homelab_tasks.title: Migrate from Docker Compose to local Kubernetes
homelab_tasks.description: Move homelab stack to k3s or MicroK8s on Jetson. Write Helm charts or manifests for all services. Plan migration path with minimal downtime

homelab_tasks.title: Library management from OpenClaw
homelab_tasks.description: Build or find a service/script to browse OpenClaw catalog and add items directly to Radarr/Sonarr library

homelab_tasks.title: Instagram 'To Watch' list → library pipeline
homelab_tasks.description: Monitor saved/bookmarked Instagram posts (movie recommendations), extract titles, and auto-add to Radarr/Sonarr or Watcharr watchlist. Likely needs a custom bot or n8n/Huginn workflow

homelab_tasks.title: Buy bigger storage
homelab_tasks.description: Current SSD is limited. Research options: larger NVMe SSD, external HDD, or a small NAS (e.g. 2-bay Synology). Consider Jetson's USB/NVMe bandwidth
